summary: Editable D2 JSON draft for human review.
general_information: The RRS Sir David Attenborough is a British-built polar research vessel with a PC4 ice class and winterisation to -35 C. It has a length of 128m, a gross tonnage of 15,984gt, and a deadweight of 6,162dwt. The vessel is equipped with four Rolls-Royce Bergen B33:45 engines, two Saft battery packs, and a Yara Industries SCR system for NOx reduction. It has a range of almost 19,000 nautical miles and can spend 60 days at sea without resupply.

items.value_text: UKRI - United Kingdom Research and Innovation / BAS - British Antarctic Survey

items.display_name: sister ships already completed (excluding ship presented)

items.value_text: 45 engines (two each of 9-cylinder and 6-cylinder versions) will provide a total of 21,600kW for both mechanical propulsion and electric power generation on board. The RRS Sir David Attenborough will be fitted with two Rolls-Royce Promas integrated rudder and propeller systems 5MW peak effect battery capacity. The batteries will allow for silent operation and vibration-free sailing when required. To meet NOx Code requirements the ship's main engine exhausts are connected to a Yara Industries SCR system engines

The local AI did not return usable JSON, so the app created a structured editable draft from parser data.

standard.name: DNV_GMOD_INTERNAL_DEFAULT
standard.description: Default maritime taxonomy used by the application for vessel data extraction, validation and classification.
standard.rule: AI must classify extracted data using this taxonomy first. Missing categories must be proposed as extensions, not invented as final nodes.
